sidebar.noSelectionHint: Click a tool, then click on the PDF to place a field.
sidebar.name: Field Name
sidebar.label: Label
sidebar.moveToLeft: Move INFO panel to the left edge
sidebar.moveToRight: Move INFO panel to the right edge
sidebar.infoFunctionText: Upload static PDFs and make them interactive. Use the Editor view to place fields and the Preview to fill them with data. The form can be downloaded in two ways:
sidebar.infoFunctionPoint1: Editable PDF: Fields remain active and can still be filled out.
sidebar.infoFunctionPoint2: Finalized PDF: Fields are "burned" into the document and cannot be modified later.
sidebar.infoPrivacyText: 100% local. All data and documents remain exclusively on your device. No upload to any server.
sidebar.infoDisclaimerText: Use at your own risk. No liability for malfunctions or data loss.
sidebar.filenameTemplateTip:
Syntax: [FieldName, N] for first N chars, or -N for last N chars.

E.g. [Date -- 1, -4] → 15.09.1957 returns '1957'.

editor.uploadPrompt: Upload a PDF to get started
editor.uploadPromptSub: Your file never leaves your device

export.confirmFlattenMessage: The finalized PDF will have all fields converted to static text. This cannot be undone. Are you sure?
export.noFonts: Font files not found. Please add Inter-Regular.ttf and Inter-Bold.ttf to /public/fonts/.

consent.title: Your Privacy Matters
consent.body: OpenFormPDF processes everything locally in your browser. Your PDF and form data are never uploaded to any server, and no analytics or telemetry are collected.
consent.subtext: This app is open-source under the MIT License.

errors.passwordProtected: This PDF is password-protected. Please remove the password first.
errors.corrupted: This file appears to be corrupted or is not a valid PDF.
errors.unknown: Failed to load PDF. Please try another file.
errors.fontMissing: Inter font files missing from /public/fonts/. See README.

footer.privacy: Data stays on your device. Always.

validation.dateHistory: You are using a historical date. If correct, confirm with OK, otherwise correct the input.
validation.dateFuture: You entered a date far in the future. If correct, confirm with OK, otherwise correct the input.

extract.title: Data Extraction
extract.clickToUpload: or click to select a file
extract.filenameHint: If the filename does not look as expected, make sure you have correctly configured the <1>Export Filename Template</1> in 'Edit' mode using `[FieldName]`.
extract.toastInvalidPdf: Please drop a valid PDF file.
